purpose: Catch abstract nouns treated as social actors in short payoff lines without concrete action or cause.
rejectIf: sentence includes a concrete policy, safety, legal, or logistical reason
sentence refers to a literal place allocation
positiveExamples: Fear had no place in her schedule.
negativeExamples: Fear had no place in the posted evacuation plan because the exits were marked and staffed.
notes: This starts with the Sunstone source frame only.
The common matcher rejects full-mode cause clauses such as because.
